text:
THE STATE OF PERSONA EVALUATION • THE WORK IS SERIOUS

The field measures personas rigorously — and is improving fast.

ICLR 2025
CoSER
Motivation-driven agents from 17,966 characters / 711 books.

2025
PsyMem
26 quantitative psychological indicators per character, anchored by knowledge-graph memory.

ACL 2024
InCharacter
Fidelity via psychological interviews, not self-report.

Surveys (Chen 2024; Wang 2026) trace the arc — and document the asymmetry: automated evaluators, including LLM-as-judge, privilege fluency and naturalness over fidelity to the record.
